name: Baked Apple Pancake
recipeIngredient: 1 whole apple, peeled and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. In a large skillet, sauté apple slices in butter over medium heat until tender. Add sugar, cinnamon, nuts, and raisins; stir to coat the apples. Remove from heat and set aside.
3. For the batter, melt butter in the microwave and let it cool slightly. Spray a 9-inch nonstick skillet with Pam cooking spray.
4. In a large bowl, beat eggs until light. Gradually add flour and salt, stirring until smooth. Beat in melted butter and milk.
5. Spoon the apple filling into the skillet and pour the batter over the top. Bake at 450°F for 15 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 350°F and continue baking 5-10 more minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before cutting into four wedges. Serve with favorite toppings.
